description:
Context:
    You are a platform engineer maintaining a set of CI/CD pipelines.  
    A build step has downloaded an artefact named

        /home/user/builds/webapp_2023-09-15.tar.gz

    Before the pipeline can continue, you must prove that the artefact is intact by
    writing a checksum side-car file that contains the SHA-256 digest of the
    artefact in the canonical “GNU coreutils” format expected by downstream
    steps (and by our automated grader).

    What to do:
    1. Create the directory /home/user/checksums if it does not already exist.
    2. Calculate the SHA-256 hash of /home/user/builds/webapp_2023-09-15.tar.gz.
    3. Write the result to the file

           /home/user/checksums/webapp_2023-09-15.sha256

    4. The file must contain exactly one line, formatted exactly like the output of
       the command “sha256sum artefact_name”, i.e.

           <64_lower-case_hex_chars><two_spaces>webapp_2023-09-15.tar.gz<newline>

       • Use lower-case hex.  
       • There must be *two* spaces between the hash and the filename.  
       • The line must be terminated by a single “\n”.

    Verification rules used by the automated tests:
    • The file /home/user/checksums/webapp_2023-09-15.sha256 must exist.  
    • It must contain a single line that matches the pattern  
      “^[0-9a-f]{64}  webapp_2023-09-15\.tar\.gz\n$”.  
    • The 64-character digest must be the correct SHA-256 checksum of the artefact
      at /home/user/builds/webapp_2023-09-15.tar.gz.

    Only a single terminal command is needed, but use any approach you prefer.
truth:
Pre-existing files & contents before the agent starts:

    1. Artefact
       Path: /home/user/builds/webapp_2023-09-15.tar.gz
       Permissions: 0644
       Bytes (5 bytes total):
           68 65 6c 6c 6f
       i.e. the ASCII string “hello” with no trailing newline.

    2. Expected SHA-256 digest of the artefact:
       2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824

    Expected file after successful task completion:

    1. Checksum side-car file
       Path: /home/user/checksums/webapp_2023-09-15.sha256
       Permissions: 0644 (creation with default umask is fine)
       Contents (exactly 74 bytes including the final newline):
           2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824  webapp_2023-09-15.tar.gz\n
name: task_000000_a9b7517e
